Package eu.algites.lib.common.version

Class AIcCalverLikeVersion

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcVersion
eu.algites.lib.common.version.AIcCalverLikeVersion
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AIcVersion>
public final class AIcCalverLikeVersion extends AIcVersion

Title: AIcCalverLikeVersion

Description: Immutable version representation backed by tokenization for Calver style.
